response:
Sec. 1  
[THE WRITER IS CONSIDERING TWO PUBLISHERS FOR HER MANUSCRIPT AND NEEDS TO COMPARE THEIR OFFERS BASED ON SALES REVENUE.]  

Sec. 2  
[PUBLISHER A OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 3000 DOLLARS PLUS 5 PERCENT OF THE BOOKS SALES REVENUE.]  

Sec. 3  
[PUBLISHER B OFFERS A FLAT FEE OF 1500 DOLLARS PLUS 10 PERCENT OF THE BOOKS SALES REVENUE.]  

Sec. 4  
[TO DETERMINE WHEN PUBLISHER A IS MORE LUCRATIVE THAN PUBLISHER B WE NEED TO SET UP AN INEQUALITY.]  

Sec. 5  
[THE INEQUALITY IS 3000 PLUS 0.05X GREATER THAN 1500 PLUS 0.10X.]  

Sec. 6  
[SOLVING THE INEQUALITY GIVES US THE RANGE OF SALES REVENUE WHERE PUBLISHER A IS MORE BENEFICIAL.]  

Sec. 7  
[THE SOLUTION TO THE INEQUALITY IS X LESS THAN 30000 DOLLARS.]  

Sec. 8  
[WITHIN THE ANTICIPATED SALES RANGE OF 10000 TO 40000 DOLLARS PUBLISHER A IS BETTER FOR SALES REVENUE LESS THAN 30000 DOLLARS.]
